name: Homemade Ice Cream - Diabetic
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the evaporated milk and sugar replacement in a bowl. Beat well until the sugar is dissolved.
2. Add the whole milk and vanilla extract to the mixture. Beat well to combine.
3. Gradually add the eggs, beating vigorously until fully incorporated into the milk mixture.
4. Pour the mixture into an ice cream maker and freeze according to the manufacturer's directions.
1 serving = 1/2 cup milk, 1/2 lean meat.
Calories = 122
